seo.title: Styling Guidelines
seo.description: CSS and Tailwind styling rules: allowed utility prefixes, forbidden colors, required cn utility usage

header.title: Styling and CSS System Guidelines
header.description: Centralized UI management through design tokens (CSS Variables) and Tailwind CSS configuration.

benefit_text: Leveraging a single source of truth via <one>CSS Variables</one> allows for instant theme changes and ensures all components follow defined design tokens.

styles.label: Global Styles
styles.text: The <one>global.css</one> file combines Tailwind layers and imports design tokens.

config.label: Configuration
config.text: The <one>tailwind.config.ts</one> file maps CSS variables to Tailwind utility classes.

variables.title: CSS Variables
variables.description: Defining core tokens: breakpoints, font sizes, and grids.

theme.title: Theming
theme.description: Color palettes and shadows for light and dark modes.

global.title: Global Layers
global.description: Tailwind initialization and base element styles.

restrictions.title: Forbidden Palettes
restrictions.description: Absolute restriction on using standard Tailwind colors (blue-500, red-600, etc.). All colors must be derived from design tokens.
